title: Sqlitelogictest crash on complex case statement
poc: SELECT 50, CASE WHEN NOT - COUNT ( * ) IN ( - - 41 * + 92 * + + ( + + 10 ) + - MAX ( DISTINCT + 74 ), + 14, + 11 * + COUNT ( * ) * + ( - + CASE + 77 WHEN - 52 THEN + + 43 + + 71 + - AVG ( ALL + + 93 ) + 12 / - - COUNT ( * ) ELSE NULL END ), COUNT ( - 91 ) + + + 71 * + + CASE - + 53 WHEN - + 94 + - 39 - + - 10 + 13 + SUM ( DISTINCT - + 24 ) THEN NULL WHEN - AVG ( ALL 53 ) THEN 76 ELSE - 17 END ) THEN - AVG ( ALL - ( + 63 ) ) END * + 62 AS col0;
key_bug_features: Crash on complex case statement in SQL query
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value FLOAT, status VARCHAR(10));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, status) VALUES (1, 50.5, 'active'), (2, NULL, 'inactive'), (3, -10.2, 'active');
SELECT id, CASE WHEN value IS NULL THEN 'no value' WHEN value < 0 THEN 'negative' ELSE 'positive' END AS value_status FROM test_table;
SELECT COUNT(*), CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 2 THEN 'multiple' ELSE 'single' END AS count_status FROM test_table;
SELECT id, CASE WHEN value IN (SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_table WHERE status = 'active') THEN 'average' ELSE 'not average' END AS avg_status FROM test_table;
